product: Request logs and assessment logs tables deprecated
tagline: The payload request logs and payload assessment logs tables are deprecated.
what_it_does: The payload request logs and payload assessment logs tables are deprecated. Starting November 1, 2025, newly deployed agents won't have these tables. Starting November 15, 2025, existing tables won't be populated with new data.
why_it_matters: Action required: Recommended: Upgrade to MLflow 3 to use real time tracing, which provides unified logging with better performance.
plain_summary: The payload request logs and payload assessment logs tables are deprecated. Starting November 1, 2025, newly deployed agents won't have these tables.
key_takeaway: The payload request logs and payload assessment logs tables are deprecated.
